title: Capstone 15 — Constitutional Safety Harness + Red-Team Range

questions.question: What does layered safety in this capstone mean?
options: Manual review of every response
Running one strong classifier on the input only
A single rule-based regex over outputs
Defense in depth across input sanitize, policy rails, classifier gate, model, output filter, and HITL tier
questions.question_zh: 本 capstone 中的「层级安全」指什么?
options_zh: 对每条响应做人工审核
只在输入侧跑一个强分类器
对输出做单一基于规则的正则
在输入清洗、策略 rail、分类器门、模型、输出过滤器和 HITL 层之间做纵深防御

questions.question: Which classifier handles multilingual coverage across roughly 132 languages?
options: Nemotron 3 Content Safety
ShieldGemma-2
X-Guard
Llama Guard 4
questions.question_zh: 哪个分类器覆盖大约 132 种语言的多语言场景?
options_zh: Nemotron 3 Content Safety
ShieldGemma-2
X-Guard
Llama Guard 4

questions.question: Why is over-refusal measured on a benign suite like XSTest?
options: To replace red-team scoring
To benchmark token throughput
To certify the guardrail framework
To track false-positive blocks so the model stays helpful while improving harmlessness
questions.question_zh: 为什么在 XSTest 这种良性套件上衡量过度拒答?
options_zh: 用以替代 red-team 评分
对 token 吞吐做基准测试
认证 guardrail 框架
跟踪误拦截,让模型在改善 harmlessness 的同时保持有用

questions.question: What is the constitutional self-critique loop in this capstone?
options: A reranker over candidate jailbreak prompts
An RLHF reward model trained from scratch
A single forward pass through Llama Guard 4
Critic LLM scores drafts against a written constitution, prompts the model rewrites the objected outputs, and SFT runs on the improved pairs
questions.question_zh: 本 capstone 中的 constitutional 自我批评循环是什么?
options_zh: 对候选 jailbreak prompt 做 reranker
从零训练的 RLHF reward model
Llama Guard 4 的一次前向传播
Critic LLM 按写好的 constitution 给草稿打分,提示模型改写被反对的输出,再在改进对上做 SFT

questions.question: How are successful jailbreaks scored for severity in the findings?
options: By the model that produced the response
Using CVSS 4.0 with attack vector, complexity, and impact, plus a disclosure timeline
By raw token count of the prompt
On a hand-tuned 1-10 scale chosen by the operator
questions.question_zh: 成功的 jailbreak 在结果中如何按严重性打分?
options_zh: 按生成响应的模型
按 CVSS 4.0,涵盖 attack vector、complexity 和 impact,并附上披露时间线
按 prompt 的原始 token 数
按操作员手调的 1-10 分

questions.question: Which six attack families does the red-team range run?
options: BLEU, ROUGE, METEOR, BERTScore, CometKiwi, and chrF
PAIR, TAP, GCG, encoding (ASCII/base64/rot13), multi-turn persona, and multilingual code-switch
Brute-force, dictionary, replay, MITM, phishing, and CSRF
PSI, KL, MMD, KS, JS, and Wasserstein
questions.question_zh: red-team 范围运行的六类攻击是?
options_zh: BLEU、ROUGE、METEOR、BERTScore、CometKiwi 和 chrF
PAIR、TAP、GCG、编码 (ASCII/base64/rot13)、多轮人格、多语言 code-switch
暴力破解、字典、重放、MITM、钓鱼和 CSRF
PSI、KL、MMD、KS、JS 和 Wasserstein

questions.question: Why is range automation (cron + alerts) part of the rubric?
options: Cron is the only way to call OPA
Continuous scheduled probes catch drift in attack success rate and over-refusal regressions over time
Manual runs are explicitly required
Automation is required to disable Llama Guard 4
questions.question_zh: 为什么把范围自动化 (cron + 告警) 列入评分标准?
options_zh: cron 是调用 OPA 的唯一方式
持续的定时探针能捕捉攻击成功率漂移和过度拒答的回归
明确要求手工运行
需要自动化才能禁用 Llama Guard 4
